test_hello.description: Simplest possible user template — a plain info card. If this shows up in list_panel_templates(), the ENV template loader is working.

content.title: Hello from user templates
content.body: This panel was loaded from a JSON file in ICLI_WEB_TEMPLATES_DIR. If you can see it, the loader works.

test_form.description: Tiny 2-field form to verify form template loading + validation.

test_pick.description: Quick choice test — three buttons that echo the selection back as a query.

content.title: Test choice
content.prompt: Pick one to send back to the agent:
